author: titan
description: Standing contract — per-user conversation bundle (arch §12.2 + §12.3, PLAN_synthesis_engine_Phase2.md §2C.d + D-P2-5). The Phase 2 standing pilot: on every sealed conversation-fork TX carrying a `user:<hash>` tag, the post-seal contract hook (PLAN §2B BlockBuilder._emit_maintain_bundle_events) emits MAINTAIN_BUNDLE; synthesis_worker maintains a ring-buffer of the last 50 TXs per user in association_bundles. Cross-process consumers fetch via BridgeRecall.read_bundle('user', <hash>, 'conversation') — turning RECALL of a bundled entity from a SEARCH into a single READ (arch §12.2 'precompiled by SC = incremental view maintenance'). entity_id_from='tag_prefix:user:' extracts the hashed user id from the first tag matching the prefix.
